member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.DoubleFromSharedStorage.Build(System.String,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Builds a IInputDouble for the shared storage type from the given input.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: A StringFromSharedStorage based on the inputs.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.DoubleFromUserVarWithCollection.Build(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Builds a new instance of the class.
member.param: The collection of the user variable.
member.returns: A new IInputDouble for the given user variable collection and name.
member.exception: If user variable does not exist.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.DoubleFromUserVarWithoutCollection.Build(System.String)
member.summary: Builds a new instance of the class.
member.returns: A new IInputDouble for the given user variable name.
member.exception: If user variable does not exist.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.DoubleLiteral.Build(System.String)
member.summary: Builds a IInputDouble of literal type from the given input.
member.param: User input, expected to be a valid double.
member.returns: The IInputDouble based on the given input.
member.exception: If unable to convert the input to an `double`.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.IInputDataFactory
member.summary: A set of functions working of factories depending on the data type.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.IInputDataFactory.CreateInputString(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates an IInputString object based on the input.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: The given IInputString based on the input.
member.exception: If the function is unable to determine the type of input.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.IInputDataFactory.CreateInputInteger(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates an IInputInteger object based on the input.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: The given IInputInteger based on the input.
member.exception: If the function is unable to determine the type of input and it's not a valid integer.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.IInputDataFactory.CreateInputDouble(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates an IInputDouble object based on the input.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: The given IInputDouble based on the input.
member.exception: If the function is unable to determine the type of input and it's not a valid double.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.FactoryBuilder
member.summary: Builds a default IInputDataFactory.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.FactoryBuilder.Build
member.summary: Builds a default IInputDataFactory.
member.returns: A default IInputDataFactory.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.IInputDouble
member.summary: Abstracts the an input data of type string.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.IInputDouble.Get
member.summary: Resolves and return the value of the given user setting.
member.returns: The double type at the moment of the call.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.IInputDouble.IsLiteral
member.summary: Check wether the double value is literal or not.
member.returns: True - the value is literal, false - otherwise.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.IInputInteger
member.summary: Abstracts the an input data of type string.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.IInputInteger.Get
member.summary: Resolves and return the value of the given user setting.
member.returns: The int type at the moment of the call.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.IInputInteger.IsLiteral
member.summary: Check wether the integer value is literal or not.
member.returns: True - the value is literal, false - otherwise.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.IInputString
member.summary: Abstracts the an input data of type string.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.IInputString.Get
member.summary: Resolves and return the value of the given user setting.
member.returns: The string type at the moment of the call.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.IInputString.IsLiteral
member.summary: Check wether the string is literal or not.
member.returns: True - the value is literal, false - otherwise.

member.summary: Builds a IInputInteger for the shared storage type from the given input.

member.returns: A StringFromSharedStorage based on the inputs.

member.returns: The IInputInteger based on the given input.
